setup_steps.title: Create Plaid Account
setup_steps.description: Sign up for Plaid at https://dashboard.plaid.com
actions: Copy your Client ID and Secret

setup_steps.title: Store Credentials in Azure Key Vault
manual_alternative: az keyvault secret set --vault-name jarvis-lumina --name plaid-client-id --value <your-client-id>
az keyvault secret set --vault-name jarvis-lumina --name plaid-secret --value <your-secret>
az keyvault secret set --vault-name jarvis-lumina --name plaid-environment --value sandbox

setup_steps.title: Set Up OAuth Flow
setup_steps.description: Implement Plaid Link for user authorization
notes: Plaid Link is the UI component for user authorization
Users connect their bank accounts via Plaid Link
After authorization, you receive a public_token
Exchange public_token for access_token using exchange_public_token()

setup_steps.title: Deploy Azure Functions
actions: Azure Function template created in azure_functions/plaid_webhook/
Configure webhook URL in Plaid Dashboard

setup_steps.title: Register Account in JARVIS
setup_steps.description: Add Plaid account to financial registry
